name: TestGetWaitEventKLineFrame
title: TestGetWaitEventKLineFrame
description: If a K-Line frame is the last event that triggers a wait instruction, the content can be called up with the first function.
The second function allows to call the content and the end of byte time stamps.

parameters.name: bufferOut
parameters.description: Byte data buffer of the frame.

return: On success a value greater 0, otherwise a value less than 0.
